(def done-in-any (filter some? (map (fn [id]
  (let [prs (filter #(= (:closes_linear %) id) (concat merged-prs open-prs closed-prs))]
    (when (not-empty prs)
      {:issue id :prs (map #(select-keys % [:number :repo :state]) prs)})))
  done-ids)))

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; The condition: done issues that at least one PR claims to close (closes_linear)
;; but NOT by any MERGED PR.

(def issues-matching
  (filter (fn [r]
    (and (:mentioned-by-any? r)
         (not (:mentioned-by-merged? r))))
  results))

(map :issue issues-matching)"}
